# AI Systems Architect - Consulting & Development

## The Capability
Bespoke agentic AI systems and local scaffolding tailored for Australian small-to-medium businesses. The objective is sovereignty: moving businesses away from expensive SaaS subscriptions and establishing ownership of automated workflows via local compute and API routing.

## The Manifesto
AI is evolving too fast to risk vendor lock-in. Renting intelligence equates to renting competitive advantage. I build flexible, API-agnostic scaffolding that automates complex data tasks, significantly reduces operational overhead, and ensures IP remains secure on the client's own hardware.

## The Architectural Truths & Tech Stack
To build reliable, production-grade AI systems, I rely on actual real-world utility over hype:

- **Top Agents**: Hermes Agent (industry leader by downloads, best for having agents self-write skills) and OpenClaw (premier open-source, integrates flawlessly with custom Codex/Claw memory combos).
- **Coding Models**: Codex (precision, rigid syntax) and Claude Code (architecture, reading between the lines, knowing what a human maintainer needs).
- **Model Meta**: Currently utilizing GLM 5.1, GPT 5.4 (5.5 imminent), Claude Opus 4.7, and Claude Sonnet 4.6. Keeping a close watch on Google Gemma (for local compute) and Nemotron.
- **Routing**: OpenRouter is critical infrastructure. It allows rapid model switching mid-task to optimize cost and capability. I exclusively use OpenRouter's ranking page to gauge model efficacy, as it tracks real-world utilization rather than artificial benchmarks.
- **Data & Integrations**: 
  - *Pre-built skills are overrated*: I engineer agents to write their own skills dynamically.
  - *MCPs*: Enabled when necessary, but bypassed by default. They are overly complex for SME use-cases, highly fiddly, and token-heavy.
  - *RAG & Vector DBs*: While capable (Pinecone, Weaviate), rigid RAG is token-expensive. I prioritize lightweight, bespoke memory systems before scaling to heavy vector databases.

## The Offer: 2-Hour Proving Ground
A low-risk, high-impact discovery session. I map operational bottlenecks and implement an immediate, zero-cost AI workflow to demonstrate value. Subsequent engagements transition to fast, project-based billing with no retainers.

## Scarcity & Focus
To guarantee high-reliability systems, my roster is strictly capped to 5 active client slots simultaneously.

## Community Commitment
A dedicated portion of my time is allocated to developing free, open-source automations for local Australian family-owned businesses.

## Contact & Location
- Location: Brisbane, Australia
- Email: rhczs6bz4d@privaterelay.appleid.com
